title: CEO Commentary on Loan Condition
content:
Charge-Offs & Recoveries
(Charge-off and recovery data presented are as of March 31, 2026)
Year-to-date gross charge-offs totaled $0. Losses remain concentrated in All Other Unsecured ($0) and Used Vehicle ($0), which together accounted for approximately 0% of total losses.
Year-to-date recoveries were not disclosed in the source materials for this period.
The portfolio continues to be supported by disciplined underwriting, proactive collection efforts, and ongoing monitoring as charge-off activity remains at zero.
